reviews.review_description: Really scary really fun but fix holsters

In this game the scariest thing is the buggy mechanics  the whole game is unresponsive, if you play you'll be walking around in dark for 24 minutes, die, and throw your headset across the room, not from fear, but from rage

developer_response.body:
Hey man thanks for the review, it really means a lot! I will agree with you the game is very buggy and very un polished. This was my first game so this was more me trying to learn the ropes of how VR game development works. After a while I decided to stop working on the game as I didn't find it fun anymore and wanted to work on my next project. So the game is left in this state with bugs and glitches that won't be fixed and it being kinda playable. So sorry the game wasn't as good as you hoped :(
-BlackLoboGaming

reviews.review_description: I went from a man to a baby 👶

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it! Thanks for leaving a review!

reviews.review_description: Not bad at all graphics are good and it’s pretty scary
But improve the graphics, visuals and environments etc, just like it looks on the apps  title cover.

developer_response.body:
Hey thanks for leaving a review! I'm currently working with a company to get some better assets for the game! So hopefully the graphics, visuals and environments should improve latter on. But thanks for leaving a review and feedback, it really means a lot!
-BlackLoboGaming

reviews.review_description:
It is a very good game but there is some things to fix like glitches. Also Multiplayer would be very good.
Maybe more entities.

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving a review and feedback! The bugs and glitches should be fixed soon. Also this game sadly won't be multiplayer but the next VR game I'm going to make will be a multiplayer VR horror game so stay tuned for that. Anyways thanks for leaving a review!

reviews.review_title: Good game but has some bugs
reviews.review_description: I’m the developer but the game I feel like is really fun and terrifying. There are bugs and glitches but I am working on getting those patched asap! But anyways I hope you try out this game!
It is dark and creepy sometimesyou can see the shadow in light

developer_response.body: Hey thank you for leaving a review it really means a lot! Sadly I won't be updating this game anymore as I move on to bigger and better stuff so bugs/glitches won't be fixed. Although I hoped you enjoyed the current version of this game. Thanks again for leaving a review!
